hindi: जय हनुमान ज्ञान गुण सागर, जय कपीस तिहुँ लोक उजागर।
english: Victory to Hanuman, ocean of wisdom and virtue; victory to the lord of monkeys who illuminates the three worlds
roman: Jaya Hanuman gyana guna sagara jaya Kapeesa tihun lok ujagar

hindi: रामदूत अतुलित बल धामा, अंजनि-पुत्र पवनसुत नामा॥
english: Messenger of Ram, abode of incomparable strength; son of Anjani known as the son of the Wind
roman: Rama duta atulit bal dhama Anjani putra Pavanasuta naama

hindi: हनुमान तण्डव करते हैं, तीनों लोक थर्राते हैं।
english: When Hanuman performs the Tandava, all three worlds tremble
roman: Hanuman tandav karte hain teenon lok thartrate hain

hindi: महावीर के बल से डरते, असुर सब भागते जाते हैं॥
english: Fearing the strength of the great hero, all demons flee
roman: Mahaveer ke bal se darte asur sab bhagate jaate hain

hindi: वज्र देह दानव दलन, भूमि पर करते नृत्य।
english: With his thunderbolt body crushing demons, he dances on earth
roman: Vajra deh danav dalan bhoomi par karte nritya

hindi: राम भक्ति में मग्न होकर, करते आनंद का नित्य॥
english: Immersed in devotion to Ram, he daily performs this joyful dance
roman: Rama bhakti mein magna hokar karte anand ka nitya

hindi: लाल देह लाली लसे, अरु धरि लाल लंगूर।
english: His red body glows brilliantly, bearing his red tail
roman: Laal deh laali lase aru dhari laal langoor

hindi: वज्र देह दानव दलन, जय जय जय कपि सूर।।
english: His thunderbolt body destroys demons — victory, victory, victory to the heroic monkey
roman: Vajra deh danav dalan jaya jaya jaya kapi soor
